# IX Sala de Trading

> Professional live trading room and community for LATAM traders, powered by INFINOX. Real-time analysis, signals, education, and webinars.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the IX Sala de Trading community, features, mentors, and pricing.
- [Register](/register): Create an account to access the live trading room.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your account.
- [Webinar](/webinar): Free live trading webinar landing page.
- [Community Guidelines](/community/guidelines): Rules and expectations for community members.

## Optional

- [Forgot Password](/forgot-password): Reset your account password.
